title.zh: 《国务院关于对外投资的规定》
title.en: State Council Regulation on Outbound Investment

summary.zh: 中国对外投资领域的高位阶行政法规，涉及对外投资服务、管理、保护、安全审查和违法责任。
summary.en: A State Council regulation governing outbound investment services, administration, protection, security review, and liabilities.

title.en: Measures for the Administration of Overseas Investment by Enterprises

summary.zh: 发改委项目端境外投资核准、备案、报告和事中事后监管框架。
summary.en: NDRC framework for project-side approval, filing, reporting, and ongoing supervision of overseas investment.

title.en: Measures for the Administration of Overseas Investment

summary.zh: 商务部关于境外投资备案、核准和企业报告义务的基础部门规章。
summary.en: MOFCOM departmental rule on filing, approval, and reporting duties for outbound investment.

title.zh: 《促进和规范数据跨境流动规定》
title.en: Provisions on Facilitating and Regulating Cross-Border Data Flow

summary.zh: 中国数据出境安全评估、标准合同、认证和豁免场景的重要便利化规则。
summary.en: Important facilitation rules for data export security assessments, standard contracts, certification, and exemption scenarios.

title.en: Measures for Security Assessment of Data Exports

summary.zh: 规定重要数据和一定规模个人信息出境的安全评估触发条件、申报材料和评估重点。
summary.en: Sets triggers, filing materials, and review focus for security assessment of important data and certain personal data exports.

title.zh: 《个人信息出境标准合同办法》
title.en: Measures on the Standard Contract for Personal Information Export

summary.zh: 个人信息出境标准合同机制的适用条件、合同备案和个人信息保护影响评估要求。
summary.en: Rules on applicability, filing, and personal information protection impact assessments for standard contracts.

summary.zh: 细化网络数据处理者在个人信息、重要数据、平台和数据安全管理方面的义务。
summary.en: Details duties of network data processors on personal information, important data, platforms, and data security governance.

summary.zh: 中国个人信息处理、跨境提供、敏感个人信息、自动化决策和个人权利的基础法律。
summary.en: Core Chinese law for personal information processing, cross-border transfer, sensitive data, automated decision-making, and individual rights.

summary.zh: 规定数据分类分级、重要数据保护、数据安全审查和数据出口管制等基础制度。
summary.en: Provides baseline rules for data classification, important data protection, data security review, and data export controls.

title.en: Regulation on Export Control of Dual-Use Items

summary.zh: 中国两用物项出口许可、最终用户和最终用途管理、管制清单和违法责任的核心规则。
summary.en: Core Chinese rules for dual-use export licensing, end users, end uses, control lists, and liabilities.

title.zh: CFIUS 外资安全审查入口
title.en: CFIUS foreign investment security review portal

summary.zh: 美国外资并购、少数股权、房地产和敏感技术交易国家安全审查的核心入口。
summary.en: Core portal for U.S. national security review of foreign acquisitions, minority investments, real estate, and sensitive technology transactions.

title.zh: 美国对外投资安全项目

summary.zh: 美国对特定涉华先进技术投资设置禁止或申报要求的监管入口。
summary.en: Regulatory portal for U.S. prohibitions and notification requirements for certain investments involving covered advanced technologies.

summary.zh: 美国两用物项、软件、技术、再出口和域外管辖出口管制的基础法规。
summary.en: Baseline U.S. export control regulations for dual-use items, software, technology, reexports, and extraterritorial controls.

summary.zh: 美国出口管制实体清单，是技术、供应链、客户筛查和再出口合规的关键名单。
summary.en: Key U.S. export control list for technology, supply-chain, customer-screening, and reexport compliance.

title.zh: BIS 出口合规项目指南
title.en: BIS guidance on developing an export compliance program

summary.zh: 出口合规制度建设、筛查、分类、培训、审计和整改的官方实务指南。
summary.en: Official practice guidance for export compliance systems, screening, classification, training, audits, and remediation.

summary.zh: 美国金融制裁、客户筛查、受益所有人和支付路径合规的核心名单入口。
summary.en: Core list service for U.S. financial sanctions, customer screening, beneficial ownership, and payment-chain compliance.

title.zh: OFAC 制裁合规承诺框架
title.en: A Framework for OFAC Compliance Commitments

summary.zh: 管理层承诺、风险评估、内部控制、测试审计和培训五支柱制裁合规框架。
summary.en: Five-pillar sanctions compliance framework: management commitment, risk assessment, internal controls, testing/audit, and training.

summary.zh: 美国强迫劳动进口执法的高风险实体名单，影响原产地、供应链和进口证据包。
summary.en: High-risk entity list for U.S. forced-labour import enforcement, affecting origin, supply-chain, and import evidence packages.

summary.zh: 进口商证明非强迫劳动来源所需交易、生产、运输和供应商证据的官方指南。
summary.en: Official guidance on transaction, production, shipping, and supplier evidence needed to rebut forced-labour presumptions.

summary.zh: 美国通信设备和服务国家安全风险清单，影响设备授权、采购和网络替换。
summary.en: U.S. national-security list for communications equipment and services, affecting authorization, procurement, and network replacement.

organization: Office of the U.S. Trade Representative

summary.zh: 美国对华301关税、排除程序和复审行动的官方入口。
summary.en: Official portal for U.S. Section 301 tariff actions, exclusions, and reviews concerning China.

summary.zh: 美国检方评估企业合规项目有效性的核心标准，覆盖风险评估、第三方、并购和持续改进。
summary.en: Core U.S. prosecutorial criteria for assessing compliance programs, covering risk assessment, third parties, M&A, and continuous improvement.

summary.zh: 美国知识产权进口排除调查的重要入口，影响硬件、电子、通信和消费品出口。
summary.en: Key portal for U.S. IP-based import exclusion investigations affecting hardware, electronics, telecoms, and consumer products.

summary.zh: 欧盟成员国外资审查合作机制，涵盖安全和公共秩序相关信息交换。
summary.en: EU cooperation mechanism for Member State FDI screening on security and public order grounds.

title.zh: 欧盟投资审查政策入口

summary.zh: 欧盟外资审查政策、年度报告、成员国机制和改革动向的官方入口。
summary.en: Official portal for EU investment screening policy, annual reports, Member State mechanisms, and reform updates.

summary.zh: 规制外国补贴扭曲欧盟内部市场，影响并购、公共采购和主动调查。
summary.en: Regulates foreign subsidies distorting the EU internal market, affecting M&A, public procurement, and ex officio investigations.

title.zh: 欧盟外国补贴条例监管入口
title.en: European Commission Foreign Subsidies Regulation portal

summary.zh: 欧盟委员会关于FSR申报、调查、指南和案例的官方入口。
summary.en: European Commission portal for FSR notifications, investigations, guidance, and cases.

title.zh: 欧盟碳边境调节机制条例
title.en: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism Regulation

summary.zh: CBAM对钢铁、铝、水泥、化肥、氢、电力等产品的碳排放申报和证书成本产生影响。
summary.en: CBAM affects emissions reporting and certificate costs for steel, aluminium, cement, fertilizers, hydrogen, electricity, and related goods.

summary.zh: CBAM过渡期、正式期、申报、授权申报人和方法学资料入口。
summary.en: Portal for CBAM transitional and definitive phases, reporting, authorised declarants, and methodologies.

title.zh: 欧盟企业可持续尽职调查指令
title.en: EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive

summary.zh: 大型企业人权和环境尽职调查义务，会通过客户合同和供应链问卷传导给中企供应商。
summary.en: Human-rights and environmental due diligence duties for large companies that may pass through customer contracts and supplier questionnaires.

title.zh: 欧盟强迫劳动产品禁令

summary.zh: 禁止强迫劳动产品进入欧盟市场或从欧盟出口，要求企业准备供应链风险证据。
summary.en: Prohibits products made with forced labour from the EU market or export, requiring supply-chain risk evidence.

summary.zh: 要求特定农林商品和相关产品证明无毁林来源，影响原料和供应链追溯。
summary.en: Requires covered commodities and products to prove deforestation-free origin, affecting raw materials and supply-chain traceability.

summary.zh: 覆盖电池碳足迹、尽职调查、回收、标签和产品要求，对新能源供应链影响显著。
summary.en: Covers battery carbon footprint, due diligence, recycling, labelling, and product requirements, with major impacts on new-energy supply chains.

summary.zh: 按风险分级规制AI系统，影响AI产品、SaaS、智能硬件和通用AI模型出海。
summary.en: Risk-based regulation of AI systems affecting AI products, SaaS, connected devices, and general-purpose AI models.

summary.zh: 规制平台内容、非法商品、透明度、广告和超大型平台风险评估。
summary.en: Regulates platform content, illegal goods, transparency, advertising, and very large platform risk assessment.

summary.zh: 规制大型平台守门人义务，影响应用商店、广告、互操作和数据使用。
summary.en: Regulates gatekeeper duties for large platforms, affecting app stores, advertising, interoperability, and data use.

title.zh: 欧盟通用数据保护条例

summary.zh: 欧盟个人数据处理、跨境传输、数据主体权利和高额罚款的基础规则。
summary.en: Foundational EU rules on personal data processing, transfers, data subject rights, and significant fines.

title.zh: 欧盟通用产品安全条例

summary.zh: 消费品安全、线上市场、召回、产品追溯和经济经营者义务的关键规则。
summary.en: Key rules on consumer product safety, online marketplaces, recalls, traceability, and economic-operator duties.

title.zh: 英国国家安全与投资法通知指南
title.en: UK National Security and Investment Act notification guidance

summary.zh: 英国17个敏感领域强制通知和国家安全干预制度的官方指南。
summary.en: Official guidance on mandatory notification and national-security intervention in 17 sensitive UK sectors.

summary.zh: 英国资产冻结、旅行禁令和其他制裁措施的官方名单入口。
summary.en: Official list for UK asset freezes, travel bans, and other sanctions measures.

summary.zh: 英国军品、两用物项、软件、技术和服务出口管制的官方指南。
summary.en: Official UK guidance on export controls for military goods, dual-use items, software, technology, and services.

title.zh: 英国ICO国际数据传输指南

summary.zh: 英国GDPR下个人数据向境外传输的转移机制、风险评估和合同要求。
summary.en: Guidance on transfer mechanisms, risk assessments, and contract requirements for personal data transfers under UK GDPR.

title.zh: 加拿大投资国家安全审查指南
title.en: Guidelines on the National Security Review of Investments

summary.zh: 加拿大投资法下国家安全审查因素，涵盖经济安全、关键供应链和敏感技术。
summary.en: Investment Canada Act national-security factors covering economic security, critical supply chains, and sensitive technology.

title.zh: 加拿大强迫劳动和供应链报告入口
title.en: Canada forced labour and supply chains reporting portal

summary.zh: 加拿大供应链强迫劳动和童工风险报告义务的官方入口。
summary.en: Official portal for Canadian reporting duties on forced labour and child labour risks in supply chains.

title.zh: 澳大利亚外国投资国家安全指南
title.en: Australia foreign investment national security guidance

summary.zh: 澳大利亚国家安全业务、国家安全土地和强制申报外国投资的官方指南。
summary.en: Official guidance on national security businesses, national security land, and mandatory foreign investment notifications in Australia.

title.zh: 澳大利亚现代奴役声明登记册

summary.zh: 企业现代奴役风险披露、供应链治理和声明对标的重要公开登记册。
summary.en: Public registry for benchmarking modern slavery risk disclosures, supply-chain governance, and corporate statements.

title.zh: 印度 Press Note 3 外资审批政策
title.en: India Press Note 3 foreign investment policy

summary.zh: 对来自与印度接壤国家或相关受益所有人的投资设置政府审批路径，是中企赴印投资核心规则。
summary.en: Requires government-route approval for investments from land-border countries or related beneficial owners, central to Chinese investment in India.

organization: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

title.zh: 印度数字个人数据保护规则
title.en: India Digital Personal Data Protection Rules

summary.zh: 印度个人数据处理、数据主体权利、儿童数据和跨境数据要求的重要官方规则入口。
summary.en: Official rules for personal data processing, data principal rights, children's data, and transfer requirements in India.

organization: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

summary.zh: 日本外汇与外国贸易法下出口管制、技术转让和贸易控制政策入口。
summary.en: METI portal for export controls, technology transfers, and trade control policy under Japan's FEFTA framework.

organization: Autoridade Nacional de Protecao de Dados

summary.zh: 巴西LGPD监管机构入口，覆盖数据主体、合规、执法、国际事务和指引。
summary.en: Brazilian LGPD regulator portal covering data subjects, compliance, enforcement, international affairs, and guidance.

title.zh: 巴西经济防卫行政委员会
title.en: Brazil Administrative Council for Economic Defense

summary.zh: 巴西竞争法、并购审查、卡特尔调查和公共采购串通执法入口。
summary.en: Brazilian portal for competition law, merger review, cartel investigations, and bid-rigging enforcement.

title.zh: 巴西强迫劳动雇主名单
title.en: Brazil registry of employers using slave-like labour conditions

summary.zh: 巴西劳工部公开的强迫劳动相关雇主名单，对供应链尽调和承包商筛查具有参考价值。
summary.en: Brazilian labour ministry registry relevant to supply-chain due diligence and contractor screening for slave-like labour conditions.

title.zh: OECD跨国企业负责任商业行为准则
title.en: OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises on Responsible Business Conduct

summary.zh: 跨国企业在人权、劳工、环境、反腐败、消费者和信息披露方面的核心软法标准。
summary.en: Core soft-law standard for multinational enterprises on human rights, labour, environment, anti-corruption, consumers, and disclosure.

title.zh: OECD负责任商业行为尽职调查指南
title.en: OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Business Conduct

summary.zh: 企业识别、预防、减轻和说明供应链不利影响的通用尽调框架。
summary.en: General due-diligence framework for identifying, preventing, mitigating, and accounting for adverse supply-chain impacts.

title.zh: 联合国工商企业与人权指导原则
title.en: UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights

summary.zh: 保护、尊重和救济框架，是全球人权尽调和企业申诉机制的基础文本。
summary.en: Foundational protect, respect, and remedy framework for human-rights due diligence and corporate grievance mechanisms.

summary.zh: 识别强迫劳动风险的基础指标，可用于供应商审计、访谈和整改计划。
summary.en: Baseline indicators for identifying forced-labour risks in supplier audits, interviews, and remediation plans.

title.zh: ILO跨国企业和社会政策三方原则宣言
title.en: ILO Tripartite Declaration of Principles concerning Multinational Enterprises

summary.zh: 跨国企业在就业、培训、工作条件、劳资关系和社会政策方面的重要国际标准。
summary.en: Important international standard for multinational enterprises on employment, training, working conditions, industrial relations, and social policy.

title.en: IFC Performance Standards on Environmental and Social Sustainability

summary.zh: 项目融资、基础设施、矿业和能源项目常用的环境社会风险管理标准。
summary.en: Environmental and social risk-management standards widely used in project finance, infrastructure, mining, and energy projects.

summary.zh: 多边开发银行项目中的欺诈、腐败、串通、胁迫、妨碍调查和交叉禁入风险入口。
summary.en: Portal for fraud, corruption, collusion, coercion, obstruction, and cross-debarment risks in multilateral development bank projects.

summary.zh: WTO反倾销规则、通知、委员会和成员贸易救济措施的基础入口。
summary.en: WTO portal for anti-dumping rules, notifications, committee work, and member trade remedy measures.

title.zh: WTO补贴与反补贴规则入口
title.en: WTO subsidies and countervailing measures portal

summary.zh: WTO补贴、反补贴、产业政策争端和成员通知义务的基础入口。
summary.en: WTO portal for subsidies, countervailing measures, industrial-policy disputes, and member notification duties.

title.zh: WTO技术性贸易壁垒规则入口
title.en: WTO Technical Barriers to Trade portal

summary.zh: 产品标准、技术法规、合格评定和通报评议机制的多边贸易规则入口。
summary.en: Multilateral portal for product standards, technical regulations, conformity assessment, and notification/comment mechanisms.

summary.zh: 原产地、转运、优惠关税和贸易救济规避风险的海关规则入口。
summary.en: Customs portal for origin, transshipment, preferential tariffs, and trade-remedy circumvention risk.

title.zh: FATF反洗钱和反恐融资建议

summary.zh: 受益所有人、客户尽调、制裁执行、可疑交易和跨境支付合规的重要国际标准。
summary.en: Key international standard for beneficial ownership, customer due diligence, sanctions implementation, suspicious transactions, and cross-border payment compliance.

summary.zh: 全球FDI趋势、产业政策、投资便利化和可持续投资数据的权威宏观背景。
summary.en: Authoritative macro background on global FDI trends, industrial policy, investment facilitation, and sustainable investment.
